task_completion.description: Open StudioTax 2024 and create or open a return for Alex Mercer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is visible with the taxpayer name 'Alex Mercer' displayed.
Schedule 4 is visible with an entry for carrying charges (Line 22100), expected to be $2,200.

task_completion.description: Complete Schedule 3 with capital losses from shares.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schedule 3 is visible showing dispositions of shares (e.g., 'TechCorp' and 'Bankrupt Gold') with a total gross loss of $48,000 and net capital loss of $24,000.

task_completion.description: Complete Form T1A to carry back net capital losses to 2021 and 2022.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T1A is visible showing a request for net capital loss carryback, with $18,500 applied to 2021 and $5,500 applied to 2022.

task_completion.description: Save the return to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or StudioTax title bar confirms the file is saved as 'alex_mercer.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the StudioTax GUI to enter data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing within the StudioTax 2024 interface, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual StudioTax application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements match the genuine StudioTax 2024 software, not a text editor or mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Alex Mercer. Expected values: T4 employment income is $92,000. Schedule 4 (Line 22100) carrying charges is $2,200. Schedule 3 must show a sale of 'TechCorp' (Proceeds: $12,000, ACB: $45,000) and a Section 50(1) worthless shares election for 'Bankrupt Gold' (ACB: $15,000), resulting in a total gross loss of $48,000 and a net capital loss of $24,000. Form T1A must show net capital loss carrybacks of $18,500 to 2021 and $5,500 to 2022. Output file must be saved as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\alex_mercer.24t.
